executives.name: Jim Vena
executives.background: Jim Vena is the Chief Executive Officer of Union Pacific. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2019 to 2020 and has over 40 years of experience in the railroad industry, including a long career at CN.

executives.name: Susan Schwab
executives.background: Professor Emerita at the University of Maryland and former U.S. Trade Representative.
